M1740_BD_MEM_DFICT M1740 (M0610) Cog/Behavr/Psych Symp- Memory Deficit This field indicates memory deficit has been demonstrated at least once a week. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
